mapper.select: select * from appr_form f where f.com_id = #{comId} and f.for_status = 1 and f.is_deleted = 0 and f.for_version = ( select max(ff.for_version) from appr_form ff where ff.com_id = f.com_id and ff.for_id = f.for_id and ff.for_status = 1 and ff.is_deleted = 0 )
select * from appr_form where for_id = #{forId} and for_version = #{forVersion}

select e.emp_id, e.emp_name, p.pos_name, c.com_id, c.com_name, d.dept_id, d.dept_name from employee e inner join company c on e.com_id = c.com_id inner join department d on e.dept_id = d.dept_id inner join emp_position p on e.pos_id = p.pos_id where e.emp_id = #{empId}
mapper.insert: insert into appr_doc( emp_id, for_id, for_version, com_id, doc_title, doc_content, doc_status, is_important) values( #{empId}, #{forId}, #{forVersion}, #{comId}, #{docTitle}, #{docContent}, #{docStatus}, #{isImportant})
